name: PlayCanvas
description: WebGL-first 3D game engine with a cloud-based editor. Used for browser games, interactive 3D ads, and metaverse experiences. Open-source runtime under MIT license.

seo.title: PlayCanvas — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: PlayCanvas: WebGL-first 3D game engine with a cloud-based editor. Used for browser games, interactive 3D ads, and metaverse experiences. Open-source runtime und

when_to_use: Browser-playable 3D game shipped via WebGL with no install
Interactive 3D product configurator for e-commerce website
Metaverse experience prototype built in PlayCanvas cloud editor
3D ad creative developed using PlayCanvas ad network SDK
Multiplayer browser game with real-time physics and networking

pros: First-class cloud editor collaborative like Figma
Runtime is tiny and loads fast on mobile web
Used by brands for web-based 3D ads and configurators
Engine source is MIT licensed on GitHub
cons: Editor is cloud-only with no offline mode
Subscription model for team features and private projects
3D feature set lighter than Unity or Unreal
Snapshot acquired it in 2024 — roadmap uncertainty
review.verdict: The best collaborative 3D web engine today; watch the Snapshot acquisition before betting a studio on it.
review.best_for: Web-first 3D games, ads, and configurators needing live collaboration
review.not_for: Console or native desktop targets and offline editing teams
